source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain, pre-1928)
title: [Haines, Alaska] panoramic view
description: A 1915 panoramic photograph of Haines, Alaska, showing the full sweep of Portage Cove, the town and Fort Seward nestled against the forested peninsula, and the Chilkat Range flanking Lynn Canal on both sides.
alt: 1915 panoramic photograph of Haines and Fort Seward from across Lynn Canal with the Chilkat Range behind
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services Panoramic Photographs (pan 6a00326) and visually confirmed
